resources.string: Bicilona helps you plan Bicing trips across Barcelona — from finding the right station to timing your ride so you don\'t get charged extra.\n \n 🗺️ Plan a trip\n Search for a destination or long-press anywhere on the map. Bicilona finds the best pickup and drop-off stations to minimise your total journey time (walking + cycling + walking).\n \n 🟢🟠🔴 Station colours\n Stations are colour-coded by bike availability: green (4+), orange (1–3), red (none). Grey means the station isn\'t operational. Tap any station for live bike and dock counts.\n \n 🟣 Alternative drop-offs\n When a route is active, purple dots show nearby drop-off alternatives. Tap one to re-route.\n \n ⭐ Favourites\n Save destinations you visit often. They appear as gold stars on the map and in the search dropdown. Tap a star to navigate there or remove it.\n \n 🚲 Start ride\n Tap "Start ride ↗" to open turn-by-turn cycling directions in Google Maps and start the ride timer simultaneously.\n \n ⏱️ Ride timer\n Bicing charges extra after 30 minutes (configurable in settings). The timer runs as a notification so it works with your phone in your pocket:\n • Warning vibration (2 pulses) when time is running low\n • Urgent vibration (3 pulses) at the redirect threshold\n • Auto-redirect — finds the nearest station with free docks and launches new Google Maps navigation automatically, replacing your current route\n \n The timer also syncs to your smartwatch via notification mirroring.\n \n ⚙️ Settings\n Tap the gear icon to adjust search radius, bike type preference (mechanical/electric/all), and timer thresholds.
